configurations.name: Client (Next.js)
runtimeArgs: LOCAL_IP=$(ifconfig | grep 'inet ' | grep -v 127.0.0.1 | awk '{print $2}' | head -n 1) && export SERVER_URL=http://$LOCAL_IP:3001 && export NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVER_URL=http://$LOCAL_IP:3001 && cd party-game && npm run dev:client

configurations.name: Server (Express + Socket.io)
runtimeArgs: LOCAL_IP=$(ifconfig | grep 'inet ' | grep -v 127.0.0.1 | awk '{print $2}' | head -n 1) && export CLIENT_URL=http://$LOCAL_IP:3000 && cd party-game && npm run dev:server
